fields.title: Build event writer, cache manager, and .beads migration
fields.description: Implement safe backlog mutation writes and first-run migration from existing Beads data into the new append-only event store.
fields.design: Each mutation writes one immutable event file under .pi/backlog/events/. Add cache invalidation and rematerialization logic and first-run import that converts .beads/issues.jsonl or .beads/beads.db into seed events. Keep event writes atomic and keep temp and lock files out of git.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Every create, update, status, dependency, and comment mutation writes a new event file without rewriting older events. First-run import from .beads/issues.jsonl produces backlog seed events automatically. Imported issues preserve IDs and dependency relationships exactly. Local cache rebuilds correctly after new events are appended.
